{"items":[{"full_name":"SheafOfModules.pushforward","formal_statement":"Formal Name: SheafOfModules.pushforward | Kind: definition | Type: {C : Type u₁} →
  [inst : CategoryTheory.Category.{v₁, u₁} C] →
    {D : Type u₂} →
      [inst_1 : CategoryTheory.Category.{v₂, u₂} D] →
        {J : CategoryTheory.GrothendieckTopology C} →
          {K : CategoryTheory.GrothendieckTopology D} →
            {F : CategoryTheory.Functor C D} →
              {S : CategoryTheory.Sheaf J RingCat} →
                {R : CategoryTheory.Sheaf K RingCat} →
                  [inst_2 : F.IsContinuous J K] →
                    [F.IsContinuous J K] →
                      (S ⟶ (F.sheafPushforwardContinuous RingCat J K).obj R) →
                        CategoryTheory.Functor (SheafOfModules R) (SheafOfModules S) | Path: Mathlib.Algebra.Category.ModuleCat.Sheaf.PushforwardContinuous","informal_statement":"Given a continuous functor \( F \colon (C, J) \to (D, K) \) between sites equipped with Grothendieck topologies, and a morphism of sheaves of rings \( \varphi \colon S \to (F.\text{sheafPushforwardContinuous} \text{RingCat} J K).\text{obj} R \), the pushforward functor \( \text{pushforward} \varphi \colon \text{SheafOfModules} R \to \text{SheafOfModules} S \) is defined as follows:
- On objects: For a sheaf of modules \( M \) over \( R \), its pushforward is the sheaf of modules over \( S \) obtained by first applying the pushforward of presheaves of modules along \( \varphi \) and then verifying the sheaf condition via the continuous pushforward of \( F \).
- On morphisms: For a morphism \( f \) of sheaves of modules over \( R \), its pushforward is the induced morphism obtained by applying the pushforward of presheaves of modules to \( f \)."},{"full_name":"SheafOfModules.forget","formal_statement":"Formal Name: SheafOfModules.forget | Kind: definition | Type: {C : Type u₁} →
  [inst : CategoryTheory.Category.{v₁, u₁} C] →

      (R : CategoryTheory.Sheaf J RingCat) → CategoryTheory.Functor (SheafOfModules R) (PresheafOfModules R.val) | Path: Mathlib.Algebra.Category.ModuleCat.Sheaf","informal_statement":"The forgetful functor from the category of sheaves of modules over a sheaf of rings $R$ to the category of presheaves of modules over the underlying presheaf of rings $R.\text{val}$. 

This functor maps:
- Each sheaf of modules $F$ to its underlying presheaf of modules $F.\text{val}$
- Each morphism $\phi$ of sheaves of modules to its underlying morphism $\phi.\text{val}$ of presheaves of modules"},{"full_name":"TopCat.Sheaf.pushforward_obj_val","formal_statement":"Formal Name: TopCat.Sheaf.pushforward_obj_val | Kind: theorem | Type: ∀ {C : Type u} [inst : CategoryTheory.Category.{v, u} C] {X Y : TopCat} (f : X ⟶ Y) (F : TopCat.Sheaf C X),
  ((TopCat.Sheaf.pushforward C f).obj F).val = (TopCat.Presheaf.pushforward C f).obj F.val | Path: Mathlib.Topology.Sheaves.Functors","informal_statement":"Given a continuous map $f \colon X \to Y$ between topological spaces and a sheaf $\mathcal{F}$ on $X$ with values in a category $\mathcal{C}$, the underlying presheaf of the pushforward sheaf $f_*\mathcal{F}$ on $Y$ is equal to the presheaf pushforward $f_* \mathcal{F}$ of the underlying presheaf of $\mathcal{F}$."},{"full_name":"TopCat.Sheaf.pushforward_forget","formal_statement":"Formal Name: TopCat.Sheaf.pushforward_forget | Kind: theorem | Type: ∀ (C : Type u) [inst : CategoryTheory.Category.{v, u} C] {X Y : TopCat} (f : X ⟶ Y),
  (TopCat.Sheaf.pushforward C f).comp (TopCat.Sheaf.forget C Y) =
    (TopCat.Sheaf.forget C X).comp (TopCat.Presheaf.pushforward C f) | Path: Mathlib.Topology.Sheaves.Functors","informal_statement":"For any continuous map $f \colon X \to Y$ between topological spaces, the composition of the pushforward functor $f_* \colon \mathrm{Sheaf}_C(X) \to \mathrm{Sheaf}_C(Y)$ with the forgetful functor $\mathrm{Sheaf}_C(Y) \to \mathrm{Presh}_C(Y)$ is equal to the composition of the forgetful functor $\mathrm{Sheaf}_C(X) \to \mathrm{Presh}_C(X)$ with the presheaf pushforward functor $\mathrm{Presh}_C(X) \to \mathrm{Presh}_C(Y)$. In other words, the following diagram commutes:

\mathrm{Sheaf}_C(X) @>{f_*}>> \mathrm{Sheaf}_C(Y) \\

\end{CD}
\]"},{"full_name":"PresheafOfModules.pushforward","formal_statement":"Formal Name: PresheafOfModules.pushforward | Kind: definition | Type: {C : Type u₁} →
